title: Senior Software Engineer - BigBasket - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BigBasket - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Senior Software Engineer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
